Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Iteration]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — An Iteration is a cycle or version of the universe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Suriel was close to every Iteration of reality in the Way.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — An Iteration can be rewound to a pristine condition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — The Iteration screamed with the fury of a black-haired woman in furs.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The stability of the Iteration decreases as the battle rages.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — When an Iteration dies normally, it corrodes into corrupted fragments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — The current setting is Iteration 001: Sanctum.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth did not want to open the Iteration up to others.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider had to sink deeper into the Iteration to address a problem.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — The current Iteration is at risk of being lost due to a lack of void membrane and existential infrastructure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — An Iteration designation is assigned to worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The group plans to break the whole Iteration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — The characters are inside an Iteration close to Sanctum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — An Iteration is a new world created by incorporating fragments into the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Iteration being created by the group is a miniature world composed of multiple fragments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Judges' presence reinforced the stability of the Iteration.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
